economic_notes: Sts'ailes has business entities in salmon production (Harrison Salmon Producers LP), eco energy development (Sakwi and Bremner Trio LPs). COVID-19 noted as significant event post year-end; FNFA provided $280,203 interest relief subsequent to year end.
notes: Auditor firm name not explicitly stated - only 'Chartered Professional Accountants' from Chilliwack, BC (address: 1-45780 Yale Road, Chilliwack). Seven entities fully consolidated including Sts'ailes Development LP, Development Corporation, Chehalis Indian Band Economic Development Trust, Social Housing, Sasquatch Crossing Eco Lodge, and two land holding companies. Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method (Harrison Salmon Producers LP, Sakwi LP, Bremner Trio LP). Term loans due on demand of $2,732,315 held with Bank of Montreal separate from long-term debt of $13,273,620. Net debt figure of -$7,003,238 taken from Statement of Changes in Net Debt (actual 2020 end of year). Total government transfers estimated as ISC $8,437,701 + Province of BC $3,368,114 + FNHA $2,014,001 + CMHC $80,142 + SSET $617,373 + FNESC $821,121 = $15,338,452; OSR = total revenue minus government transfers.
